summary: Soundboard recording of an energetic 1985 show with a stellar first‑set opener and a second set built around Terrapin Station → Playing in the Band → Crazy Fingers, captured with good clarity.
review: The reviewers rave about this concert’s high‑octane first set (Why Don’t We Do It > Bertha > Jack Straw) and a second‑set sequence that places Terrapin Station, Playing in the Band and Crazy Fingers together for the first time. The soundboard source is described as satisfactory with no audible flaws, letting Jerry’s introverted guitar work, Phil’s solid bass, and the band’s tight rhythm shine.

ai_rating.rationale: Strong musical performance with many standout songs and no reported recording problems; rating reflects a very good show captured on a soundboard.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No specific audio complaints were mentioned; reviewers imply the SBD capture is clear and balanced enough for enjoyment.

standout_songs: Why Don't We Do It In The Road
show_quality.setlist_flow: First set described as a “rocket ride” with an explosive opener, while the second set opens strong with Terrapin Station and then moves through Playing in the Band into Crazy Fingers, maintaining forward momentum to a hot Truckin! finish.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Garcia is praised for his introverted brilliance, humming during Crazy Fingers and handling the challenging jam with finesse.
band_member_comments.Phil: Bass is noted as “just right in the mix.”
band_member_comments.Drums: Drum work highlighted in transitions (e.g., into Drumz) and driving the set’s energy.
